translations.Choose the next state. Archived projects: Choose the next state. Archived projects are hidden from your default list and do not accept new time until reactivated.
translations.This project is archived. It is read-onl: This project is archived. It is read-only. To log time or edit details, reactivate it to Active or On Hold using "Change status".
translations.Status, customer, and time tracking in o: Status, customer, and time tracking in one place.
translations.Enter the person's Nextcloud user ID (lo: Enter the person's Nextcloud user ID (login name), then pick a role.
translations.To avoid mistakes, use “Change status” o: To avoid mistakes, use “Change status” on the project page: transitions are validated there. Archiving removes the project from the default list and stops new time entries until you reactivate.
translations.Time tracking is not available for this: Time tracking is not available for this project status. Change status to Active or On Hold to add entries.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
translations.New projects cannot be created as archiv: New projects cannot be created as archived. Create an active project and use “Archive” from the project view.
You do not have access to ProjectCheck.
translations.You do not have permission to change org: You do not have permission to change organization settings for ProjectCheck.
translations.Control who can see and use ProjectCheck: Control who can see and use ProjectCheck, set delegated app administrators, and adjust app defaults. Nextcloud system administrators always have full access.
translations.When enabled, only the users and group m: When enabled, only the users and group members listed below (plus system administrators) can use the app. The app is hidden from the top bar for everyone else.
translations.Allowed users (one user ID per line): Allowed users (one user ID per line)
translations.Nextcloud user IDs (login names), not di: Nextcloud user IDs (login names), not display names.
translations.Allowed groups (one group ID per line): Allowed groups (one group ID per line)
translations.Internal group identifiers as shown in t: Internal group identifiers as shown in the Nextcloud group management.
translations.Delegated app admins (one user ID per li: Delegated app admins (one user ID per line)
translations.These users can open ProjectCheck settin: These users can open ProjectCheck settings and the in-app organization page. System administrators are always included.
translations.Default for new projects when the app ha: Default for new projects when the app has no per-user override.
translations.Upper limit for new projects a single us: Upper limit for new projects a single user can create, where enforced by the app.
translations.Security token not available. Reload the: Security token not available. Reload the page.
translations.Same settings as in the administration v: Same settings as in the administration view. System administrators can also change this here. Limited users are hidden from the top bar.
translations.Set who may use the app, who can manage: Set who may use the app, who can manage these settings, and default values. Changes apply to all users in this Nextcloud. Server administrators can also edit this under Administration.
translations.These settings are security-relevant. Wr: These settings are security-relevant. Wrong allowlists or administrators can lock people out of the app or grant access too widely. If you are unsure, make a small change and test with a second account before you rely on the result.
translations.Access restriction is currently turned o: Access restriction is currently turned on. Users who are not listed in the allowlists (and are not system administrators) cannot use ProjectCheck, including this page if your account is affected.
translations.Applies to time tracking features across: Applies to time tracking features across the app.
translations.Shows or hides customer features where t: Shows or hides customer features where the app enforces it.
translations.Enables budget consumption and related w: Enables budget consumption and related warnings.
translations.You do not have permission to save. If y: You do not have permission to save. If you are not a system administrator, you may have been removed from the app’s administrator list. Reload the page.
translations.Your session may have expired. Sign in a: Your session may have expired. Sign in again, then return to this page.
translations.The form could not be read. Try again, o: The form could not be read. Try again, or contact your administrator if this keeps happening.
translations.The server could not complete the reques: The server could not complete the request. You can try again. If the problem remains, your administrator can check the server log.
translations.The server rejected the data. Check the: The server rejected the data. Check the form values and try again, or use your organization’s help channel.
translations.The save URL was not found. Reload the p: The save URL was not found. Reload the page. If the problem remains, the app may need to be updated.
translations.A server error occurred. Try again later: A server error occurred. Try again later, or ask your Nextcloud administrator to check the log.
translations.The response was not valid. Reload the p: The response was not valid. Reload the page and try again, or check with your server administrator if this keeps happening.
translations.Unexpected response. Reload the page and: Unexpected response. Reload the page and check that the app is up to date, or try again in a few minutes.
translations.The form data could not be read. Try aga: The form data could not be read. Try again, or contact your administrator if this keeps happening.
translations.The data could not be saved. Check your: The data could not be saved. Check your entries and try again.
translations.When access restriction is on, at least: When access restriction is on, at least one allowed user or one allowed group is required.
translations.The user “%s” was not found in Nextcloud: The user “%s” was not found in Nextcloud. Use the exact account login name.
translations.The group “%s” was not found in Nextclou: The group “%s” was not found in Nextcloud. Use the exact group identifier from the user management app.

translations.These are account login names (not displ: These are account login names (not display names). Search, pick people, or open “Manual entry” to type or paste one ID per line.

translations.Group identifiers are shown in Nextcloud: Group identifiers are shown in Nextcloud user management. Search, pick, or use manual entry to type or paste one ID per line.

translations.These people can open ProjectCheck setti: These people can open ProjectCheck settings and this page. System administrators are always included. Search, add, or use manual entry; one login name per line.
translations.Type one account login per line. System: Type one account login per line. System administrators always have this access; they are not required here.
translations.No matches. Try another search, or use m: No matches. Try another search, or use manual entry below.
translations.Search could not run. Sign in again, the: Search could not run. Sign in again, then return to this page and try once more; your session may have ended.
translations.You are not allowed to search the direct: You are not allowed to search the directory. If this is unexpected, reload the page, or use manual entry below.
translations.Could not reach the server to search. Ch: Could not reach the server to search. Check your network and try again, or use manual entry below.
translations.The server could not run the search. Try: The server could not run the search. Try again in a moment, or use manual entry below.
translations.Show warnings when this percentage of th: Show warnings when this percentage of the budget is used.
